summary: The diff implements a substantial portion of the requirements, including the Motoko backend actor, frontend routing, guest invitation view, dashboard structure, creation wizard, media management, template/theme selector, and decorative assets. However, several specific requirements and acceptance criteria show gaps or cannot be confirmed from the truncated diff alone.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store all data in stable vars for upgrade safety.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo snippet shows 'let invitationStore = Map.empty<Text, Invitation>()' etc. without the 'stable' keyword. Stable vars are explicitly required for canister upgrade persistence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Users can reorder events in the event management UI.
missing_requirements.reason: EventCard and EventForm components exist, but no reordering mechanism such as drag handles, up/down buttons, or a DnD library is visible in any of the shown files.

missing_requirements.requirement: Events can be deleted with a confirmation prompt.
missing_requirements.reason: EventCard has a delete button that calls onDelete directly with no confirmation dialog or prompt visible in the shown code.

missing_requirements.requirement: Background texture/pattern selector in the Template and Theme panel.
missing_requirements.reason: ColorSchemePicker and FontSelector components are present, but no background texture or pattern selector component appears in any of the shown or listed files.

missing_requirements.requirement: At least 6 distinct template live mini-previews rendering actual miniature guest invitation content.
missing_requirements.reason: Template definitions and selector UI are referenced but no TemplateMiniPreview or equivalent component rendering actual invitation content is visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Image reordering in the photo gallery upload section.
missing_requirements.reason: PhotoGalleryUpload supports add and delete but shows no reordering capability such as drag-and-drop reorder or order buttons.

missing_requirements.requirement: Preview tab in the individual invitation editor renders the full guest invitation view in an iframe or embedded component.
missing_requirements.reason: InvitationEditor page is listed as added but its content was omitted from the diff due to limits; cannot confirm the Preview tab with iframe or embedded render is implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Unpublished invitations at /:slug show an appropriate Coming Soon or 404 message.
missing_requirements.reason: GuestInvitation page is listed but its content was omitted from the diff; cannot confirm unpublished-state handling is implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: All five generated image assets must be stored as actual files in frontend/public/assets/generated.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows references to asset paths in components but no actual image files are listed as added under frontend/public/assets/generated/.

hallucinated_features.description: TanStack Router is used instead of React Router for all client-side routing.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states all routing must be client-side React Router, but the diff uses @tanstack/react-router throughout the application.

hallucinated_features.description: A dedicated /create route is added as a standalone page for the invitation creation wizard.
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec routing requirements in REQ-9 define routes for /, /dashboard, /dashboard/:slug, and /:slug only. A /create route is not mentioned in any requirement.
